Return only the complete repaired Markdown document.
Do not rewrite the guide. Only edit the listed issue spans and the smallest surrounding context needed.
Preserve unrelated headings, ordering, and correct content as-is.
Do not invent APIs. Use only provided allowed symbols, property owners, usage patterns, or local helpers defined in a code block.

Source-grounded repair requirements:
- Repair only the problematic spans and the smallest surrounding context needed; do not rewrite the whole document.
- For each listed issue, use the repository evidence and context pack to verify the corrected wording or code before returning.
- If an issue reveals the same API misuse nearby, fix the nearby equivalent misuse too; do not make unrelated style rewrites.
- After repair, re-check the edited lines against public headers, implementation files, samples, or UTCs when needed.
- For every edited C++ code block, inline API statement, and backticked API name, verify:
  - receiver method exists on the receiver type
  - static methods are called statically and member methods are called on valid instances
  - assignment target is compatible with the method return type
  - argument count, argument type, and overload shape match the public API
  - enum owner and enum value both exist
  - property constants use the correct owner and value type
  - signal callback signatures match the public signal typedef
  - code blocks do not rely on inferred namespaces or overloads from naming alone

Original Markdown:
---
title: View (Base UI Object)
sidebar_label: View (Base UI Object)
category: views-components
---

# View (Base UI Object)

`Dali::Ui::View` is the fundamental building block for all user interface elements in dali-ui applications. It provides a common set of properties for layout, appearance, and interaction, serving as the base for more specialized UI components.

## Table of Contents
- [Creating and Managing Views](#creating-and-managing-views)
- [View Properties](#view-properties)
  - [Background and Border](#background-and-border)
  - [Corner Radius](#corner-radius)
- [Handling User Interaction](#handling-user-interaction)
- [Managing Selection State](#managing-selection-state)
- [Animating Views](#animating-views)

## Creating and Managing Views

A `Dali::Ui::View` is created using its `New()` static method. Views can be arranged into a hierarchical structure, where parent views contain child views.

code_verification: receiver method exists on the receiver type
static methods are called statically and member methods are called on valid instances
assignment target is compatible with the method return type
argument count, argument type, and overload shape match the public API
enum owner and enum value both exist
property constants use the correct owner and value type
signal callback signatures match the public signal typedef
code blocks do not rely on inferred namespaces or overloads from naming alone

Ground natural-language behavior claims in the actual public headers, implementation files, samples, or UTCs when the context pack is not enough.
Before writing examples, inspect the referenced public headers and relevant sample files when needed.
Prefer examples copied or adapted from existing samples when they match the feature; otherwise keep examples small and verify every API use.
After drafting, review the completed Markdown line by line against repository evidence and fix inaccurate explanations or code before returning.
